programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: For the first time, all the eliminated All Stars get a chance to return to the competition, but they must send home a competing All Star in a shocking midseason lip sync smackdown.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars are challenged to design and host their own VIP club nights; guest judges Rita Ora and NYC Nightlife legend Susanne Bartsch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars pay tribute to the legend Judy Garland as they transform their best friends into members of their own drag family; guest judges Frances Bean Cobain and Ellen Pompeo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars star in a movie sequel centered on the sex lives of NYC singles and the actresses who play them; special guest judges, designer Jason Wu and Felicity Huffman, join.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: To win a place in Drag Race Hall of Fame, the final four queens must write and perform a verse for RuPaul's song "Super Queen," and appear on the "What's the T" podcast with RuPaul and Michelle Visage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: A new cast of queens survive a game of Ru Light, Green Light, before showing off their skills.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The second half of the new cast of 14 queens, competing to be crowned America's Next Drag Superstar, must show off their performance skills in a talent show; rapper and singer Doechii guest judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens take fashion inspiration from the board game Monopoly and must create from scratch an outfit that screams that they own everything; actress and comedian Sandra Bernhard becomes a guest judge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens receive the task of singing songs based on memorable moments from "Drag Race" history; actress Julia Schlaepfer guest judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to serve up laughs in a hilarious send-up of the iconic sketch comedy show; actor, writer and director Paul W. Downs is the guest judge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the queens put their design skills to the test in a pageant of ocean-inspired couture and showcase three fishy looks; actress and model Hunter Schafer and stylist Law Roach gue.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities; Global All Stars winner Alyssa Edwards drops by the werkroom; actress and comedian Quinta Brunson guest judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.sub-title: The Wicked Wiz of Oz: The Rusical!
programme.desc: This season's Rusical is inspired by a mashup of "Wicked, The Wizard of Oz" and "The Wiz." Jamal Sims choreographs the queens; singer Adam Lambert guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: After the Reading challenge, the queens rock out with their frocks out, as they create a look worthy of a Betsey Johnson fashion collection; Betsey Johnson guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens pay a comedy tribute to three of the shadiest queens in Drag Race herstory, Kandy Muse, Mistress Isabelle Brooks and Plane Jane.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: As a tribute to Truman Capote and his Swans, the queens must act up a storm in a high camp tale of betrayal; Cheyenne Jackson directs; singer Sam Smith guest judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens share true stories in a performance challenge with a twist; their partners must act out the stories through interpretive dance; Jerrod Carmichael guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens make over some extra special drag newbies: their moms and dads; June Diane Raphael ("Grace and Frankie") guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens audition to star in RuPaul's Drag Race LIVE! at Flamingo Las Vegas; Tracee Ellis Ross ("Black-ish") guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: All of the eliminated queens return to battle it out in a Lip Sync Lalaparuza Smackdown, with eight lip syncs, and a cash prize of $50,000 on the line.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The top queens face off in an evening of performances and lip syncs as they compete for a grand prize of $200,000; superstar Liza Minnelli joins RuPaul on stage.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens discover an explosive surprise -- that they must immediately perform six lip syncs to defend their place in the competition.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens form a pop group to write lyrics and perform choreography to a new version of RuPaul's song "Condragulations"; choreographer Jamal Sims guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: As the race for the crown continues, queens must write lyrics and perform choreography in a performance of RuPaul's song, "Phenomenon"; comedian and host Nicole Byer guest judges.

programme.desc: The queens are challenged to overact in RuPaulmark holiday movies; comedian Loni Love ("Soul Plane") guest judges.

programme.desc: Tensions rise as the queens put their design skills to the test in a pageant showcasing three bag-themed looks; Nicole Byer guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens funk it up in a disco-dancing documentary, complete with 1970s fashions.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens flex their improv skills in a reboot of the salacious talk show "Bossy Rossy," hosted by Ross Mathews; LGBT activist Ts Madison guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens must record lyrics and learn choreography as they perform in a tale on social media; choreographer Jamal Sims guest judges; Anne Hathaway makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in the Snatch Game; LGBT activist Ts Madison guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: It's Freaky Friday and the queens must turn each other into their own drag doppelgangers; Loni Love ("Soul Plane") guest judges; psychic Char Margolis makes an appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must create and brand their own versions of extravagant soft drinks; current reigning superstar Jaida Essence Hall makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens take part in a comedy roast of former "Miss Congeniality" winners Heidi N Closet, Nina West and Valentina; a guest appearance by Norvina (Instant Influencer).

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.sub-title: Henny, I Shrunk the Drag Queens
programme.desc: The queens flex their acting skills in a new sci-fi adventure, playing tiny shrunken drag queens; Cynthia Erivo ("Genius: Aretha"); Scarlett Johansson ("Black Widow") makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens write and record lyrics; the world premiere of RuPaul's new song "Lucky"; choreographer Jamal Sims makes a guest appearance.
